tasks.title: Execute the frozen ABCMB bundled-LINX convergence V2 cases
tasks.message: Attempt 4 run-20260722T134322Z finished with lease release exit=0: 6/6 cases, 0 failures, V2 frozen narrow numerical-consistency decision accepted. This completes the execution task only.

tasks.title: Complete W0-W3 registered standard-fiducial runtime slices
tasks.message: Operational milestone complete: four registered standard-fiducial runtime slices passed artifact-integrity validation. This does not complete the scientific WHY-NOT task.

tasks.title: Competitor matrix: LINX, PRyMordial, PRIMAT, PArthENoPE, AlterBBN, ABCMB+LINX
tasks.message: PR #40 merged at main 0c04fb9. Claim-evidence registry now binds nine C0-C4 candidates to exact scopes, missing evidence, falsifiers and signoffs. All C2/C3/C4 claims are machine-enforced unavailable; A00/A09/A11/A12 remain pending; Track B and Nature-tier gates remain closed.

tasks.title: Preregister neutron-lifetime N0-N3 baseline and robustness models
tasks.message: Neutron-lifetime decision frozen; A00 and independent weak-physics signoff remain required for Track B

tasks.title: Preregister primary and stress-test D/H, Y_p, CMB and GW datasets
tasks.message: Observation decision frozen before Track B production; Track B remains NOT FROZEN pending signoff and LVK likelihood audit

tasks.title: Write why-not-LINX/PRyMordial/PRIMAT and emulator economics memo
tasks.message: PR #58 merged. ABCMB V2 passed its frozen standard-point bundled-LINX numerical criteria (tolerance plateau 0.000387133 sigma; sampling plateau 0.000771123 sigma; zero drift). Full ABCMB, gradients, Fisher/HMC, posterior, extensions and final WHY-NOT remain incomplete, so progress stays 0/1.

tasks.title: Benchmark cold/warm, FP64, batch, CPU, RAM, I/O and failure rates
Inventory all existing BBNet, MCMC, solver patches, data and model files
tasks.message: SageNet structural validation passed on autodl-westb-01: all four SHA-verified checkpoints loaded with weights_only=True, strict state-dict matching, and finite (1,256,2) CPU output. This is not accuracy validation. Scaler pickles mix sklearn 1.2.2 (CosmicNet2/RNN) and 1.6.1 (LSTM/Transformer), so paper-environment equivalence remains open.

tasks.title: Deploy project-isolated research-ops service on the shared Vultr host
tasks.message: project-isolated control service, auth, ledger, local ops-status branch and health check ready; systemd persistence pending sandbox boundary

tasks.title: Create environment lock, pyproject, CI, pre-commit and make smoke
tasks.message: Environment gate complete at main a588392: exact locks, worker CPU/GPU smokes, source-revision checks, and CI evidence are all registered.

tasks.title: Validate ledger, heartbeat, stale detection and ops-status snapshots
tasks.message: PR #57 now buffers raw TimeoutError during offline start; PR #59 stops outbox drain after the first transient failure, preserving queued events while eliminating timeout-per-event lease tails. Main faca688 deployed and heartbeat CLI smoke passed on westb.

tasks.title: Migrate existing scientific code into lanhung/uncertainty and remove local paths
tasks.message: Canonical ML4GW/BBNet source snapshot imported at exact commit under MIT; earlier Hdiao112 lineage retained separately. New source audit found train/evaluate schema mismatches, so it is approved only as refactor input.

tasks.title: Reproduce one known BBNet result end-to-end through the monitored pipeline
tasks.message: PR #47 merged. Future solver/checkpoint/scaler/data/generator/MCMC handoffs now enter a deterministic checksum and provenance quarantine that never extracts, executes, imports or deserializes content. This prepares safe intake only; reproduction remains 0/3 and no missing asset is treated as supplied.

tasks.title: Build project PArthENoPE/AlterBBN plus LINX and PRyMordial reference paths
tasks.message: Still 2/4 executable paths. Direct evidence is current at main a795b95; modified PArthENoPE/AlterBBN remain the only missing paths for this task.

tasks.title: Join control + two workers to the private tailnet
tasks.message: 2026-07-22 recheck: the bjb1 primary endpoint can now reach the Tailscale control/login endpoints through its current academic proxy, but it remains unjoined because the host is actively occupied by another project's GW-YOLO CPU/I/O queues. Westb remains joined only through its existing userspace daemon and still cannot reach the Tailscale control plane through its current proxy. Completion remains 2/3 hosts.

tasks.title: Bootstrap two shared AutoDL nodes as elastic workers
tasks.message: PR #43 merged. Public-safe inventory now records the accepted westb resource capture and checksum lineage, task-time role/lease boundaries, and keeps both bjb1 nodes explicitly ineligible while externally occupied. No progress credit was added: worker bootstrap remains 1/2 until an eligible bjb1 node is independently captured and validated.

tasks.message: PR #34 merged at main 28addff. The three required functional candidates now have stable IDs and enforced placeholder fields, but progress remains 0/3: no posterior-derived basis, energy grid, eigenvalues, cumulative variance, thermal integration, or cross-validation has been approved.

tasks.title: Reaction-rate registry with central curves, sigma(T), covariance and provenance
tasks.message: PR #34 merged at main 28addff. NUC-v1 now provides a machine-readable non-production contract for 12 target core reactions and registers three incomplete head-deuterium placeholders. Progress remains 0/12: authoritative sources, central curves, sigma(T), covariances, detailed-balance mappings, solver mappings, checksums, and A03/A00/A09 review are still pending.

Production, unblinding, Pilot-1k, Pilot-10k and Nature-tier authorization remain false; NUC-v1 remains not frozen and the Fisher Gate Report remains explicitly missing. No gate progress or signoff credit was added.
